case_title: SAMUEL LEE ET AL VS. SOO YUEN BENEVOLENT ASSOCIATION (SYBA) ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-27-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, SAMUEL GRANT ARTS AND GIFTS CENTER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SOO YUEN BENEVOLENT ASSOCIATION (SYBA) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-27-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-27-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF SAMUEL LEE IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF GRANT ARTS & GIFTS CENTER IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SAMIEL LEE. DEFENDANT CHEU HUNG LOUIE IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT SOO YUEN BENEVOLENT ASSOCIATION (SYBA) IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MEMBER OF ASSOCIATION MASON FONG. THE PLAINTIFF ORALY DISMISSES CHEU HUNG LOUIE WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
